meta.title: Work Experience
meta.subtitle: Professional experience building scalable backend systems, full stack applications, and cloud-based solutions across multiple projects and roles.
meta.description: Detailed overview of professional work experience including roles, responsibilities, projects, achievements, and technologies used in real-world software engineering environments.

summary.headline: Backend-Focused Full Stack Software Engineer
summary.overview: Experienced software engineer with a strong focus on backend development, REST API design, database architecture, and cloud deployments. Proven ability to build scalable systems, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and deliver production-ready solutions.

company.name: Independent Consulting
company.description: Provided end-to-end software development services including backend API development, frontend integration, database design, and cloud deployment for multiple small and medium-sized clients.

experiences.description: Worked as a freelance software engineer delivering production-grade applications with a strong emphasis on clean architecture, security, and scalability.
responsibilities: Designed and implemented RESTful APIs using Node.js and Express
Developed database schemas and optimized queries in SQL Server and PostgreSQL
Deployed and maintained applications on AWS using EC2, Nginx, and SSL

achievements.title: Improved API Performance
achievements.description: Optimized backend APIs by refactoring database queries and implementing caching strategies.

projects.name: College Management System
projects.description: Developed a modular college management system covering admissions, faculty management, student records, and reporting.
projects.outcome: Delivered a scalable system successfully used for academic demonstrations and internal workflows.

projects.name: Portfolio and Blog Platform
projects.description: Built a personal portfolio website with dynamic blog rendering using structured JSON and Markdown.
projects.outcome: Successfully launched a fast, SEO-optimized personal site with structured content management.

feedback.review: Delivered high-quality solutions on time with clear communication and strong technical expertise.

company.name: Nexus InfoSystems
company.description: A leading provider of financial technology solutions and enterprise resource planning software for the banking sector.

experiences.description: contributed to the core banking module development, focusing on secure transaction processing and third-party API integrations.
responsibilities: Developed secure RESTful endpoints for transaction processing using Java Spring Boot
Collaborated with frontend teams to integrate APIs with Angular dashboards
Wrote comprehensive unit and integration tests to ensure 99% code coverage

achievements.title: Automated Reconciliation Process
achievements.description: Built a script to automate daily transaction reconciliation, reducing manual effort for the finance team.

projects.name: Loan Processing Module
projects.description: Engineered the backend logic for a loan eligibility calculator and application tracking system.
projects.outcome: Reduced loan approval turnaround time by 30% through automated eligibility checks.

feedback.review: Fast learner who quickly adapted to the enterprise ecosystem and consistently delivered bug-free code.

company.name: CodeCrafters Studio
company.description: A creative agency focused on building responsive websites and e-commerce stores for local businesses.

experiences.description: Assisted senior developers in building and maintaining client websites, focusing on frontend responsiveness and CMS management.
responsibilities: Converted Figma designs into responsive HTML/CSS layouts
Assisted in debugging JavaScript issues on client WordPress sites
Optimized images and assets for faster page load speeds

achievements.title: Mobile Responsiveness Overhaul
achievements.description: Updated legacy CSS for 3 major client sites to ensure full mobile compatibility.

projects.name: Local Restaurant Booking UI
projects.description: Built the frontend interface for a table reservation form integrated with a PHP backend.
projects.outcome: Enabled the client to take online reservations for the first time during the pandemic.

feedback.review: Showed great enthusiasm and attention to detail in UI implementation.
